turns.user_message: I’m new to this country and my language still isn’t perfect. At work I’m afraid to speak up, and I go quiet even when I have ideas.

turns.user_message: Sometimes I think, “Maybe it would be easier if I didn’t have to exist like this.” I’m not planning anything—just overwhelmed.
